dietfgrp50 Diet diaries Weight of food groups consumed wt50bbis_1 23051 Weight of Baby and infant foods/drinks - Biscuits - Recall Day 1 - at age 4 years {-9.0} Unknown grams Diet Diary Not applicable 1950 Yes No Diet diaries were collected in years 1950, 1982, 1989, 1999 and 2006-10. dietfgrp50 Diet diaries Date information for diet diaries date50_1f 26096 Diet diary date of recording - Recall Day 1 - at age 4 years {-9.0} Unknown date Diet Diary Not applicable 1950 Yes Yes Exact date of diet diary Diet diaries were collected in years 1950, 1982, 1989, 1999 and 2006-10. The diary in 1950 was a one day recall. Diaries in 1982 and 1989 were for a two day recall followed by a 5 day prospective. Diaries in 1999 and 2006-10 were for a 5 day prospective.
dietfgrp82 Diet diaries Date information for diet diaries date82_1f 26096 Diet diary date of recording - Recall Day 1 - at age 36 years {-9.0} Unknown date Diet Diary Not applicable 1982 Yes Yes Exact date of diet diary Diet diaries were collected in years 1950, 1982, 1989, 1999 and 2006-10. The diary in 1950 was a one day recall. Diaries in 1982 and 1989 were for a two day recall followed by a 5 day prospective. Diaries in 1999 and 2006-10 were for a 5 day prospective.
